clauses.aim_at_target.name: Aim Target
clauses.aim_at_target.tooltip: Focus the selected tile when it is within perception range and line of sight.
clauses.aim_at_nearest_foe.name: Aim Nearest Foe
clauses.aim_at_nearest_foe.tooltip: Focus the nearest living foe within perception range and line of sight.
clauses.if_marked.name: If Marked
clauses.if_marked.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused actor or tile is marked by you.
clauses.if_occupied.name: If Occupied
clauses.if_occupied.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile contains an actor.
clauses.if_clear.name: If Clear
clauses.if_clear.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile can be occupied.
clauses.mark_them.name: Mark
clauses.mark_them.tooltip: Place your mark on the focused actor or tile.
clauses.damage_them.name: Damage
clauses.damage_them.tooltip: Consume your mark on the focused actor to deal 2 damage. Without your mark, this Consumer has no effect.
clauses.raise_stone.name: Raise Stone
clauses.raise_stone.tooltip: Create a temporary blocking stone on the focused clear tile.
clauses.push_them.name: Push
clauses.push_them.tooltip: Push the focused actor away from the caster.
clauses.poison_them.name: Poison
clauses.poison_them.tooltip: Attach poison with 3 stacks to the focused actor. Poison deals 1 damage at the start of that actor's turn, then falls by 1.
clauses.bleed_them.name: Bleed
clauses.bleed_them.tooltip: Attach bleed with 1 stack to the focused actor. Bleed deals damage equal to its stack count when that actor moves.
clauses.spend_poison.name: Spend Poison
clauses.spend_poison.tooltip: Consume 1 poison stack from the focused actor. True if the stack was spent.
clauses.spend_bleed.name: Spend Bleed
clauses.spend_bleed.tooltip: Consume 1 bleed stack from the focused actor. True if the stack was spent.
clauses.lightning_shield.name: Lightning Shield
clauses.lightning_shield.tooltip: Requires at least 1 charge on the focused actor. Attach a lightning shield; when a hostile actor becomes adjacent, it deals 1 damage and spends 1 charge. It ends at 0 charge.
clauses.add_lightning_charge.name: Add Charge
clauses.add_lightning_charge.tooltip: Add exactly 1 charge to the focused actor, up to 3. An empty focus gains nothing. Lightning Shield spends 1 charge to deal 1 adjacency damage.
clauses.add_lightning_ward.name: Add Ward
clauses.add_lightning_ward.tooltip: Attach 1 ward stack to the focused actor, up to 2. Ward absorbs incoming damage events until its stacks run out.
clauses.spend_focus.name: Spend Focus
clauses.spend_focus.tooltip: Consume 1 focus bonus from the caster. True if the counter was spent.
clauses.spend_memory.name: Spend Memory
clauses.spend_memory.tooltip: Consume 1 memory bonus from the caster. True if the counter was spent.
clauses.store_memory_ref.name: Store Memory
clauses.store_memory_ref.tooltip: Store the currently focused actor or tile in the primary memory reference.
clauses.focus_memory_ref.name: Recall Memory
clauses.focus_memory_ref.tooltip: Focus the remembered actor at its current position, or the remembered tile, if it remains within perception range and line of sight.
clauses.role.generator.name: Generator
clauses.role.operator.name: Operator
clauses.role.consumer.name: Consumer
behavior_primitives.flow.stop.name: Stop
behavior_primitives.flow.stop.descriptio: End the current behavior graph and return to the caller.
behavior_primitives.focus.selected_targe: Set spell focus to the selected target tile.
Set focus to the nearest actor matching the requested relation.
behavior_primitives.focus.nearest_local_: Focus the nearest active actor in perception range and clear line of sight matching the relation.
Focus the nearest wounded, active actor in perception range and clear line of sight matching the relation.
behavior_primitives.focus.self.name: Focus Self
behavior_primitives.focus.self.descripti: Set focus to the acting actor.
behavior_primitives.focus.store_ref.name: Store Focus Reference
behavior_primitives.focus.store_ref.desc: Store the current focus in a named reference slot.
behavior_primitives.focus.ref.name: Focus Reference
behavior_primitives.focus.ref.descriptio: Restore focus from a named reference slot.
behavior_primitives.branch.occupied.name: Branch On Occupied
behavior_primitives.branch.occupied.desc: Return true if the selected target is occupied.
behavior_primitives.branch.clear.name: Branch On Clear
behavior_primitives.branch.clear.descrip: Return true if the selected tile can be occupied.
behavior_primitives.branch.adjacent.name: Branch On Adjacent
behavior_primitives.branch.adjacent.desc: Return true if two actor targets are adjacent.
behavior_primitives.branch.line_of_sight: Return true if blocking terrain does not occlude the target actor.
behavior_primitives.branch.relation.name: Branch On Relation
behavior_primitives.branch.relation.desc: Return true if two actor targets match the requested relation.
behavior_primitives.branch.tile_state.de: Return true if the target tile has the requested state.
behavior_primitives.branch.adjacent_bloc: Return true if the target actor is adjacent to blocking terrain.
behavior_primitives.counter.add.name: Add Counter
behavior_primitives.counter.add.descript: Add to a named counter on an actor, tile, or effect, with an optional maximum.
behavior_primitives.counter.consume.name: Consume Counter
behavior_primitives.counter.consume.desc: Consume from a named counter and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.counter.at_least.des: Return true if a named counter is at least the step amount.
behavior_primitives.damage.apply.name: Apply Damage
behavior_primitives.damage.apply.descrip: Damage a target actor by a fixed amount or by a counter value.
behavior_primitives.damage.prevent_event: Reduce the current damage event to 0.
behavior_primitives.effect.attach.name: Attach Effect
behavior_primitives.effect.attach.descri: Attach an effect to an actor or tile.
behavior_primitives.effect.detach.name: Detach Effect
behavior_primitives.effect.detach.descri: Remove the selected effect from its target, optionally restricted to one owner.
behavior_primitives.effect.has.name: Branch On Effect
behavior_primitives.effect.has.descripti: Return true if a target has the requested effect from the requested owner.
behavior_primitives.effect.damage_actors: Damage actors standing on tiles with an effect owned by self.
behavior_primitives.effect.clear_owned_t: Remove a tile effect owned by self.
behavior_primitives.move.relative.name: Move Relative
behavior_primitives.move.relative.descri: Move a target actor away from or toward a source actor.
behavior_primitives.move.step_toward.des: Move an actor one tile toward a target tile.
behavior_primitives.tile.set_state.name: Set Tile State
behavior_primitives.tile.set_state.descr: Set a target tile to the requested state.
behavior_primitives.tile.set_first_adjac: Set the first clear adjacent tile to the requested state.
behavior_primitives.heal.apply.name: Apply Healing
behavior_primitives.heal.apply.descripti: Heal a target actor by the step amount.

enemies.glass_hound.purpose: Chases the player and rewards push/terrain play.
enemies.ash_scribe.name: Ash Scribe
enemies.ash_scribe.purpose: Marks tiles, then punishes standing on marked ground.
enemies.root_saint.name: Root Saint
enemies.root_saint.purpose: Raises temporary terrain and, every third turn, heals near blocking tiles.
enemies.spore_cantor.name: Spore Cantor
enemies.spore_cantor.purpose: Applies poison from afar and becomes more dangerous at close range.
enemies.iron_pilgrim.name: Iron Pilgrim
enemies.iron_pilgrim.purpose: Advances as a durable melee threat and gains ward every third turn.
enemies.moss_chirurgeon.name: Moss Chirurgeon
enemies.moss_chirurgeon.purpose: Regroups with allies, then restores their health every second turn.
enemies.moss_chirurgeon.intent.regroup: regroup with the nearest visible ally
enemies.obsidian_crown.name: Obsidian Crown
enemies.obsidian_crown.purpose: Capstone boss that brands the arena, advances, and detonates its marks every third turn.
enemies.obsidian_crown.intent.brand: brand the player's tile and advance
enemies.obsidian_crown.intent.detonate: detonate brands, gain 1 ward, then strike or advance
enemies.generic.name: Enemy
rules.none.name: No Local Rule
rules.none.description: No special local rule is active.
rules.brittle_stone.name: Brittle Stone
rules.brittle_stone.description: Pushing an actor into raised stone breaks the stone and deals 1 damage.
rules.echoing_steps.name: Echoing Steps
rules.echoing_steps.description: Whenever an actor moves, it leaves its mark on the tile it enters.
rules.verdant_pulse.name: Verdant Pulse
rules.verdant_pulse.description: After each Working that changes the battlefield resolves, the player recovers 1 health.
rules.obsidian_resonance.name: Obsidian Resonance
rules.obsidian_resonance.description: After each Working that changes the battlefield, suffer 1 resonance damage, then gain 2 ward. One shield can cover an enemy blow while the other absorbs the next pulse.
environments.ashen_archive.name: Ashen Archive
environments.ashen_archive.description: A brittle repository whose stone shelves can become weapons.
environments.echoing_foundry.name: Echoing Foundry
environments.echoing_foundry.description: An iron causeway where every footfall wakes the old machinery.
environments.verdant_ossuary.name: Verdant Ossuary
environments.verdant_ossuary.description: A bone garden where hostile growth answers every wound.
environments.obsidian_sanctum.name: Obsidian Sanctum
environments.obsidian_sanctum.descriptio: A resonant black hall built to amplify dangerous workings.

relics.patient_bell.name: Patient Bell
relics.patient_bell.description: After a Working changes the battlefield, gain 1 focus.
rewards.mending_draught.name: Mending Draught
rewards.mending_draught.description: Recover 2 health before entering the next chamber.
rewards.deeper_vessel.name: Deeper Vessel
rewards.deeper_vessel.description: Gain 1 maximum health and recover 1 health.
rewards.venom_lexicon.name: Venom Lexicon
rewards.venom_lexicon.description: Unlock Poison and Spend Poison as a complete clause pair.
rewards.crimson_lexicon.name: Crimson Lexicon
rewards.crimson_lexicon.description: Unlock Bleed and Spend Bleed as a complete clause pair.
rewards.storm_lexicon.name: Storm Lexicon
rewards.storm_lexicon.description: Unlock Lightning Shield, Add Charge, and Add Ward.
rewards.patient_bell.name: Patient Bell
rewards.patient_bell.description: Gain the Patient Bell and unlock Spend Focus. The bell gathers focus after each Working that changes the battlefield.
rewards.memory_store.name: Mnemonic Lexicon
rewards.memory_store.description: Unlock Store Memory, Recall Memory, and Spend Memory.

ui.editor.cancel_connection_tooltip: Let the unfinished thread fade without connecting it.
ui.codex.title: Clause Codex
ui.codex.help: Generators establish focus or setup. Operators route or reshape it. Consumers spend setup for payoff. Add clauses, then connect outputs into another clause's IN port.
ui.codex.used_tooltip: This Working already contains that unique clause.
ui.codex.full_tooltip: A Working can hold at most seven clauses.
ui.codex.sealed_tooltip: Win encounters and choose lexicons to reveal this clause.
ui.codex.flow.condition: Flow: TRUE continues when the condition passes; FALSE continues when it fails.
ui.codex.flow.next: Flow: NEXT continues to the connected clause.
ui.play.hint: Click or Shift+WASD target · WASD move · F cast · P preview · Space wait · Tab Working · E Codex
ui.play.wait_tooltip: Hold position and let enemies act.
ui.play.restart_tooltip: Abandon this Archive and generate a new sandbox.
ui.restart.title: Leave This Archive?
ui.restart.detail: Your current sandbox will be abandoned. Cancel to keep exploring, retry this seed, or generate an unfamiliar Archive. Press R again for a new seed; Escape cancels.
ui.play.hover_preview: Hover to read its omen; press to prepare it.
ui.play.unaware: Unaware — has not entered the fight
ui.play.explore_prompt: No threat is in sight. Map the Archive, test its local law, or edit a Working while distant inhabitants sleep.
ui.play.blocked: That way is blocked. Choose another route or reshape the field with a Working.
ui.play.target_blocked: The target cursor cannot enter the unknown. Explore that way first.
ui.play.terrain_legend: ■ wall · ◆ raised stone (shatters on push impact)
ui.help.button_tooltip: Open the field guide and controls.
ui.help.title: The Living Archive
ui.help.subtitle: Explore the sandbox. Build a setup. Read the omen. Claim the payoff.
ui.help.instructions:
Each seed grows a new Archive. Explore its local law with the full Clause Codex; break the single Obsidian Crown to finish. Its coarse echo wakes after enough terrain is mapped.

1. Target: click a tile, or hold Shift with a move key. Gold is chosen; violet is automatic.
2. Preview: read the omen for free. Cyan is predicted; red is harm. No-effect omens cannot be cast.
3. Build: use up to seven unique clauses. Generators set up, Operators route, Consumers pay off.
4. Cast: commit, then nearby alerted enemies act. ■ walls and ◆ raised stone block movement and sight; pushed actors shatter raised stone.

WASD / arrows  Move or strike · Shift + move  Target
Space  Wait · F  Cast · P  Preview · Tab  Change Working
E  Codex · R  Restart menu
ui.reward.title: Choose What Endures
ui.reward.help: Carry one boon into the next chamber.
ui.run.defeat_detail: The Archive closes around you. Generate a new sandbox and write a wiser Working.
ui.run.victory_detail: You found and broke the one Obsidian Crown. The sandbox is complete; a new seed will shape another Archive.
ui.sandbox.objective_broken: {0} is broken · the Archive releases you
ui.sandbox.echo_dormant: Archive reading: {0}% mapped · Crown echo dormant
ui.sandbox.echo_awake: Archive reading: {0}% mapped · Crown echo leans {1}

ui.graph.output_tooltip: Click this output, then click another node's IN.
